properties.description: Expects values 0-6. Setting this, will let the charge display of the Battery show the according charge value for about a second. Afterwards it will switch back to showing the actual charge value. This influences the "Mode" output as well. (See Mode Values.)
Locks the Battery, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Battery on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Battery is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current charge of the Battery in watt*tic.
Returns the maximum charge of the Battery in watt*tic.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the current charge percentage of the battery.
Returns the current power potential at the input of the Battery in watts.
Returns the amount of power, currently being output by the Battery in watts.
